hero.subtitle: Convert Dragon delivers professional image conversion results without complicated settings. Start working in your browser immediately.

upload.title: Upload Files
upload.description: Select or drag and drop JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF files you want to convert.

chooseFormat.title: Choose Format & Auto Convert
chooseFormat.description: Pick the format you need and the browser converts the image instantly.

download.title: Download Results
download.description: Download the converted image immediately and use it wherever you want.

formats.title: Which image format is right for you?
formats.subtitle: Understand the characteristics of each format and start converting right away.

jpg.name: JPG / JPEG
jpg.description: Widely used image format optimized for photographs. Small file size and supported by virtually all websites and programs.

png.name: PNG
png.description: Lossless compression format supporting transparency. Ideal for logos, icons, and UI design.

webp.name: WebP
webp.description: Next-generation web format from Google with smaller files and higher quality than JPG.

avif.name: AVIF
avif.description: Modern compression format offering even higher compression than WebP.

speed.title: Blazing Fast
speed.description: All conversions happen in the browser, not on a server.

security.title: Privacy First
security.description: Uploaded files are never sent to a server; processed only on your device.

noInstall.title: No Install Required
noInstall.description: Accessible anywhere with just a browser.

safe.question: Is my image kept safe?
safe.answer: All files are handled inside your browser; never uploaded to a server.

limits.question: Are there limits on conversions or file size?
limits.answer: No limits. Very large files may take longer depending on your browser.

heic.question: Does it support iPhone HEIC files?
heic.answer: HEIC support is coming in a future update.

hero.subtitle: Reduce file size without visible quality loss. 100% browser-based, no server upload.

smart.title: Smart Algorithm
smart.description: Removes unnecessary metadata and pixels without degrading quality.

performance.title: Web Performance
performance.description: Smaller images improve LCP and SEO.

security.title: Strong Security
security.description: No data is sent externally; all processing happens on your device.

why.title: Why Convert Dragon?
why.description: Unlike other compressors that upload files to servers, we process everything locally for privacy and speed.

bestFormat.q: Which format gives the best compression?
bestFormat.a: WebP and JPG generally compress best. PNG is lossless; convert to WebP first if file size is critical.

quality.a: 75–85% for most web images. Visual quality loss is minimal.

section.whatIsDescription: {format} is widely used in digital graphics. Convert Dragon converts it to {to} while preserving original quality.
section.whyConvertDescription: {format} is essential for modern web and software compatibility. Useful for size optimization or transparency preservation.

load.title: Load Local File
load.description: File loads directly in browser memory; no server upload.

gpu.title: GPU Accelerated
gpu.description: Uses Web Workers and Canvas API to process {to} data efficiently.

download.title: Download Instantly
download.description: Local download link generated immediately after conversion.

imageCompressor.qualityHint: Lower values reduce size but may reduce quality. (Recommended: 60–70%)

purpose.title: Purpose of Collecting Information
purpose.text1: Convert Dragon does not upload or store images; all processing happens locally in the browser.
purpose.text2: No data collection or access occurs during operation.

collected.title: Information Collected
collected.text1: No signup; personal info not collected.
collected.text2: Automatically collected data for analytics may include:

security.title: Data Security
security.text1: Uses modern web tech to process all images locally.

cookies.title: Cookies & Analytics
cookies.text1: May use tools like Google Analytics for anonymous statistics.
cookies.text2: Data used only for service improvement.

retention.title: Retention Period
retention.text2: Anonymous analytics may be kept according to provider policies.

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.text1: Changes will be announced on this page.

intro.title: Service Overview
intro.text: ConvertDragon provides image conversion and compression online, free and without signup.

usage.title: Using the Service
usage.text: Use freely; features may change without notice.
list: Features may change for operational reasons.

responsibility.title: User Responsibilities
responsibility.text: Users must have rights to processed images.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.text: No images are stored on servers; all processing is local. Provider not liable for data loss or file issues.

changes.title: Service Changes
changes.text: Provider may change or suspend service for maintenance or operational reasons.

updates.title: Terms Updates
updates.text: Changes will be announced on this page.

webPerformance.title: Web Performance Optimization: Image Size & SEO
webPerformance.subtitle: 1-second delay can increase bounce rate by 32%. Improve SEO and UX with image strategies.
webPerformance.metaDescription: Guide to image optimization, LCP improvement, WebP importance, and resizing tips.

impact.title: How Image Size Affects SEO
impact.content: Google's Core Web Vitals prioritize LCP, largely determined by images. Optimizing images improves loading, server response, and rankings.

resize.title: Step 1. Resize to Actual Display Size
resize.text: Avoid oversized images; match display pixels to reduce size by 70%+.

format.title: Step 2. Use Next-Gen Formats
format.text: WebP and AVIF reduce file size while maintaining quality.

compression.title: Step 3. Algorithmic Compression
compression.text: Remove metadata and unnecessary color info for lossless size reduction.

cta.title: Ready? Make your site lighter.
cta.description: Browser-based HEIC conversion engine coming soon.

heicGuide.metaDescription: Why HEIC may not open on Windows and how to fix it. Includes JPG conversion tips.

header.subtitle: Learn why Apple chose HEIC and how to view it on Windows.

whatIs.title: 01. What is HEIC?
whatIs.paragraph1: HEIC is an image container format based on HEVC (H.265). Adopted by Apple as default in iOS 11.
whatIs.paragraph2: It compresses efficiently, reducing file size to less than half of JPEG while keeping high detail.

advantages.title: HEIC Benefits
items: Stores multiple images in one file

windowsSupport.title: 02. Why doesn't it show on Windows?
windowsSupport.paragraph1: Licensing and royalty costs delayed support. Windows requires Microsoft Store extension.
windowsSupport.paragraph2: Many browsers and legacy tools classify HEIC as unknown file type.

items.title: Change iPhone settings
items.text: Set Camera > Formats to 'Most Compatible'; new photos save as JPG.

items.title: Install Windows extension
items.text: Search 'HEIF Image Extensions' in Microsoft Store and install.

items.title: Use online converter
items.text: Instantly convert HEIC to JPG/PNG without installation.

cta.title: HEIC conversion coming soon!
cta.description: Browser-accelerated engine for safe HEIC conversion.

footer.allFilesProcessed: All files are processed in your browser.
